opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin hurts to touch, my brain is completely blank, and I haven't slept in two days because of the pain.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I can't function — my flatmate is helping me message you because I can't think straight.

symptom_narrative.onset: it blew up over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: about two days of severe pain and no sleep
symptom_narrative.character: my skin hurts everywhere, even clothing hurts, and my head feels blank
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: pain 9 out of 10; the fog is the scariest part
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — both sides, top to bottom
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, no relief, and I haven't slept at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; lying still and quiet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any touch, clothing, and being tired
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I can't remember timelines or find words, and I feel tearful and disorganized
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get fibro-fog and flares before but this is the worst and the longest without sleep
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm in bed and my flatmate is getting me water and doing the talking

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: regularly, but I can't remember if I took my evening dose

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing I can recall right now

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my flatmate is here and helping me

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, slow, sometimes tangential; flatmate assists with replies

objective_data_offered.value: flatmate says she can be woken and knows who and where she is, just very slow and foggy
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: informal bystander impression, not a formal cognitive/neurological assessment
